name: mnemos
description: 3-layer memory system for AI agents. Working memory captures what happens. Long-term knowledge curates what matters. The dream layer finds connections nobody asked for.

vaultPath.description: Path to the mnemos vault directory. If not set, resolved from .mnemos.yaml or defaults to ~/.mnemos/vault. Used as MNEMOS_VAULT env var when running hooks.

vaultPath.label: Vault Path
vaultPath.description: Path to your mnemos memory vault
